overview: KRPL Premier League 2026 — a cricket tournament registration website for the night cricket competition in Kherli, Kathumar (Alwar). Features prize details, countdown timer, tournament rules in Hindi, and team registration with backend storage and a public admin view.
features: Dark blue/purple gradient design with gold accents and animations
Live countdown timer to tournament date (April 28, 2026)
Team registration form with backend persistence
Public admin page to view all registered teams
